corePackage.description: Centralized Reporting and Smart Integrations for Salesforce Quality.
releaseNotes: Copado Test Plans Component as a plug-and-play LWC to link multiple Test Plans to Copado User Stories and Promotions without page layout changes
Copado Automated Flow Templates to automatically trigger all linked Test Plans when a User Story moves to Ready for Testing
Metadata Component Sync to automatically detect and track updates and deletions to imported metadata components from the connected org
Jira Sprint Import and Sync for release and timeline tracking within Quality Hub

Enhanced Intelligent Test Case Generation with screenshot and visual context support, multi-select capabilities, CSV export, description-based Page Object generation, and modal form locator strategies
Improved Test Artifact Validation and Reporting with hierarchy rollups, violation counts, recommendedations, and exportable reports
Improved Traceability for Test Case Generation with 6 new packaged reports and 3 new report types
Fixed issue where metadata auto-detection did not recognize components with namespace prefixes in scenario descriptions
Fixed issue where metadata auto-detection failed for custom objects when using display labels instead of API names
Fixed issue where Metadata Components were not scoped per system, preventing importing the same components across multiple connected orgs
Fixed issue where auto-detect incorrectly surfaced Apex Classes and Triggers as metadata context types

plugins.description: Connect to your Jira org, import projects and issues into Provar Quality Hub, relate test cases to issues, and export defects as bugs back into Jira.
releaseNotes: Improved Jira sync reliability for Issues, Projects, Releases, and Sprints
Import and sync Jira Sprints into Quality Hub
Support for Jira Sprint synchronization to enable release and timeline tracking
Unified tracking of release management activities and test timelines within a single application
Jira Sprint data is now available for reporting in the Quality Hub Dashboard
Jira Sprint synchronization is one-way only and does not support bi-directional sync

plugins.description: Embed manual and automated testing into your release pipeline.
releaseNotes: This release updates references to the application name from Provar Manager to Provar Quality Hub.

DevOps engineers can leverage 2 new Quality Pipelines (i.e. flow templates) to automatically trigger the execution in Provar Grid of Provar test cases directly or indirectly related to a work item when its status changes to 'In Review'
Fixed package installation issue.

plugins.description: Embed manual and automated testing into your release pipeline.
releaseNotes: This release updates references to the application name from Provar Manager to Provar Quality Hub.
Closed-loop integration with DevOps Testing is now generally available!
Provar Quality Hub Test Plan Schedule Job results syncing now properly updates DevOps Testing Suites, Executions, Execution Groups, & Quality Gates.
Improved overall test coverage for DevOps Testing integration.
Renamed Provar Manager to Provar Quality Hub in the Test Provider & project linking process.
Updated package dependencies to latest versions of all applications for compatibility.
This release updates references to the application name from Provar Manager to Provar Quality Hub.
Provar Quality Hub users can leverage Agentforce to trigger the execution of tests (using test plan schedules).

plugins.description: Link Test Plans and Gearset CI Jobs to enable automated CI/CD with test automation embedded. Trigger and manage Gearset jobs from Provar Quality Hub to streamline releases, increase test coverage, and improve delivery quality without leaving Salesforce.
releaseNotes: This release updates references to the application name from Provar Manager to Provar Quality Hub.
Trigger, Cancel, and Monitor Gearset Jobs from Provar Quality Hub.
Link Gearset CI Jobs to Provar Test Plan Schedules for a fully automated DevOps Pipeline.
Gearset Job syncing for keeping Gearset CI Job history and Provar Quality Hub job histories in sync.
Enhanced security for all SOQL/DML actions has been added.
Now publicly available on the AppExchange!

plugins.description: Relate test cases to branches and see their execution status per environment from within the branch itself.
releaseNotes: This release updates references to the application name from Provar Manager to Provar Quality Hub.
Relate test cases to branches using Branch Test Case records.
Map Provar Quality Hub system records to Flosum org records to show test executions on branch records.
Fixed vulnerabilities from code scan tools.

plugins.description: Relate Test Cases and Test Plans to User Stories and Promotions, with real-time execution status and environment visibility directly within Copado.
releaseNotes: Promotion template flow to trigger test cases linked to User Stories when Promotions are marked as Promoted
Promotion template flow to trigger test plans linked to Promotion Records when Promotions are marked as Promoted
User Story template flows to trigger Provar and Apex test plans linked to User Story records
Reusable Related Test Plans component for Promotions and User Stories using junction objects
Related Test Plans component displays Test Plan details including Test Project, number of Test Suites, Smart System linking, and last triggered date
Enhanced Related Test Cases component with tracking for Test Project, Status, Test Type, and Environment run statuses
All flows now include email alerts for Test Plan schedules
Improved reliability of new and existing template flows with reduced debugging and simpler configuration

plugins.description: Connect to QualityClouds and retrieve code scans so they can be analysed in Provar Quality Hub.
releaseNotes: This release updates references to the application name from Provar Manager to Provar Quality Hub.
Fix callout to QualityClouds API to retrieve code scans.

plugins.description: Connect to Clayton and retrieve code scans so they can be analysed in Provar Quality Hub.
releaseNotes: This release updates references to the application name from Provar Manager to Provar Quality Hub.
Fix bug with handling of branch names.

plugins.description: Connect to your Azure DevOps org, import projects and work items into Provar Quality Hub, relate test cases to work items, and export defects as bugs back into Azure DevOps.
releaseNotes: Enhanced Azure DevOps Integration settings to include guided steps for project importing and priority & status mapping.

plugins.description: Provar Automation is an end-to-end test automation solution built for Salesforce.
releaseNotes: Spring 26 Compatibility
Execution License Enforcement for CLI-Only Usage
Simplified Page Object Refactoring
Test Cycle Configuration for Provar Quality Hub Reporting
Global Password Variables Support
Automatic Edge Driver Handling
Permission Set Group Support for Extract/Assert Layout

plugins.description: ProvarDX provides the capability to extend your Salesforce CLI to run Provar test cases and simplifies scratch Org testing.
releaseNotes: Provar Quality Hub commands added to connect, display, open to Provar Quality Hub Orgs.
Provar Quality Hub commands added to retrieve, run, and report on test cases in Provar Quality Hub.
Provar Quality Hub commands added to upload code coverage and code quality reports directly to Provar Quality Hub.

plugins.description: This Jenkins plugin lets you set up and configure an environment to run Provar Automation tests with limited manual effort.
releaseNotes: Removed JDK 8 from build path in Jenkinsfile
Updated Jenkins BOM and Jenkins minimum version
